item.title: log
item.description: Wiki Log Append-only chronological record of all wiki operations. Grep tip: grep "^## \[" log.md | tail -10 → last 10 entries.

item.title: overview
item.description: Overview Master synthesis of the Royal Game of Ur codebase wiki.

item.title: index
item.description: Wiki Index Last updated: 2026-04-12 Total pages: 19 Total sources ingested: 1 (+ 3 git updates, commits e6c9c06b, 94debe5, 8×commits d81fd307→014062358) Overview overview — Master synthesis of the entire wiki Sources 2026-04-11-ur-codebase — Full Expo + Nakama codebase for the Royal Game of Ur (2026...

item.title: test-coverage
item.description: Test Coverage Report Static analysis of test file presence vs. source files across frontend, backend, and shared layers.

item.title: game-engine
item.description: Game Engine The pure, transport-agnostic logic layer that implements the Royal Game of Ur rules.

item.title: elo-system
item.description: ELO System The rating system for competitive online matches: formula, K-factors, provisional period, and leaderboard.

item.title: tournament-flow
item.description: Tournament Flow End-to-end lifecycle of a public tournament: registration, bracket creation, match launch (including the race condition), in-match play, result recording, and round advancement.

item.title: nakama-runtime
item.description: Nakama Runtime Internals The authoritative match server: how the backend tick loop, state machine, and timer system work inside backend/modules/index.ts.

item.title: nakama-service
item.description: NakamaService The singleton service class that manages Nakama auth sessions, the WebSocket, and token lifecycle.

item.title: performance
item.description: Performance Analysis Frontend and backend performance findings, bottlenecks, and optimization opportunities across the Royal Game of Ur codebase.
